name: attendance_tool
description: Fetch attendance records, attendance percentage, and missed classes.
examples: How many classes did I miss this month?

name: marks_tool
description: Fetch subject marks, average score, highest score, and weak or strong subjects.
examples: Which subject has the highest marks?

name: fee_status_tool
description: Fetch fee status, pending balance, unpaid fees, and payment history.
examples: Have I paid this month's fees?

name: homework_tool
description: Fetch homework and assignments by due date, status, or subject.

name: timetable_tool
description: Fetch timetable entries, first class, and subject class timing.
examples: What is my first class today?

name: academic_summary_tool
description: Create an academic performance summary from marks, attendance, homework, and fees.
examples: Summarize my academic performance this semester.

name: recommendation_tool
description: Analyze ERP data and suggest academic improvement actions.
examples: How can I improve my grades?
Suggest subjects I should focus on.

name: attendance_insight_tool
description: Calculate whether a student can meet or maintain a target attendance percentage.
examples: Can I maintain 90% attendance this semester?
How many classes do I need to attend to reach my attendance target?

name: exam_planner_tool
description: Create a study plan from marks and the number of days remaining before exams.
examples: My exams start in 15 days. Create a study plan.

name: parent_report_tool
description: Generate a parent-facing progress report with attendance, marks, homework, fees, and suggestions.
examples: Create a guardian report for this student.
